Klasse PluginMetaData

java.lang.Object
org.quurz.plugins.data.PluginMetaData
public class PluginMetaData extends Object

Represents the metadata of a plugin.

Metadata includes the plugin's unique identification (name and version), the contract it implements, its implementation class, and an optional description.

This class is designed for JSON deserialization via Jackson and is immutable.

Seit:
1.0.0

  • Methodendetails

    • pluginMetaData

      public static PluginMetaData pluginMetaData(@NonNull String group, @NonNull String name, @NonNull String version, @NonNull String contract, @NonNull String implementation, String description)

      Factory method for creating PluginMetaData from JSON properties.

      Parameter:
      group - the group of the plugin; must not be null
      name - the name of the plugin; must not be null
      version - the semantic version string; must not be null
      contract - the fully qualified name of the contract interface; must not be null
      implementation - the fully qualified name of the implementation class; must not be null
      description - an optional description of the plugin
      Gibt zurück:
      a new PluginMetaData instance
      Löst aus:
      NullPointerException - if any required parameter is null
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • getId

      public PluginId getId()

      Returns the unique identifier of the plugin (name and version).

      Gibt zurück:
      the plugin identifier
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • getContract

      public String getContract()

      Returns the fully qualified name of the contract interface.

      Gibt zurück:
      the contract name
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • getImplementation

      public String getImplementation()

      Returns the fully qualified name of the plugin's implementation class.

      Gibt zurück:
      the implementation class name
      Seit:
      1.0.0

    • getDescription

      public String getDescription()

      Returns the description of the plugin.

      Gibt zurück:
      the plugin description (empty string if not provided)
      Seit:
      1.0.0
